articles.title: Billionaire West Ham co-owner accused of abusing his power and preying on women for sex
articles.description: Women say David Sullivan told them they needed to have sex with him to feature in his newspapers.

articles.title: Who is David Sullivan - football boss, 'king of porn' and alleged sexual predator?
articles.description: The ex-West Ham boss has long boasted of sexual conquests, but is now accused of exploitative behaviour.

articles.title: Sikh group calls for inquiry into Henry Nowak death
articles.description: Dabinderjit Singh of the Sikh Federation has written to the government calling for an inquiry.

articles.title: New drug to stop 'Ozempic butt' muscle loss
articles.description: A third of the weight loss from obesity jabs can come from muscle, say experts.
